clarification_qa.question: What is the core industrial process of the facility, and what are its main operational steps from raw material intake to final product?
Please provide comprehensive details on all SCADA/DCS systems, including vendor, version, primary function, and redundancy status.
Could you list all critical sensors and instruments to be monitored, specifying their type, location, unit, normal operating range, alarm thresholds, and response type?
Who are the key personnel, including managerial staff, maintenance staff, safety officers, and general employees, with their roles, departments, contact information, and shift details?
What are the defined shift patterns (start/end times, typical headcount) and the detailed shift changeover/handover protocols?
What is the maintenance history for major equipment, including last maintenance date, type, next due date, and any deferred or overdue items?
Are there any API endpoints available for real-time sensor data, and if so, what are the base URL, authentication method, and polling frequency?
What are the details of critical utility and support systems (e.g., emergency power, fire safety), including type/vendor, backup/redundancy, and last tested dates?
